items.title: How Shohei Ohtani compares to Babe Ruth at age 32
items.summary: Dodgers superstar Shohei Ohtani turned 32 years old Sunday, celebrating what’s already been a Hall of Fame-worthy career. items.title: Yankees’ Tyler Hardman perseveres to finally reach Triple-A with RailRiders
items.summary: Now 27 years old, Tyler Hardman spent parts of five years with the Somerset Patriots, the New York Yankees’ Double-A affiliate. He debuted there in his second pro season, during the final week of the 2022 campaign and helped them win the Eastern League championship. He ultimately played 313 games there, second-most in franchise history, […]
